Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Where Some See Strings, She Sees a Space-Time Made of Fractals 80 upvotes, 11 comments
  2. Fungal Electronics (2021) 40 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. Don't post generated/AI-edited comments. HN is for conversation between humans. 219 upvotes, 58 comments
  4. Show HN: I built an ISP infrastructure emulator from scratch with a custom vBNG 32 upvotes, 5 comments
  5. Visualizing Ukkonen's Suffix Tree Algorithm 22 upvotes, 3 comments
  6. Show HN: Open-source browser for AI agents 67 upvotes, 17 comments
  7. Temporal: A nine-year journey to fix time in JavaScript 336 upvotes, 121 comments
  8. How we hacked McKinsey's AI platform 306 upvotes, 122 comments
  9. Building a TB-303 from Scratch 190 upvotes, 75 comments
  10. Making WebAssembly a first-class language on the Web 233 upvotes, 105 comments
  11. Hisense TVs force owners to watch intrusive ads 39 upvotes, 12 comments
  12. BitNet: 100B Param 1-Bit model for local CPUs 255 upvotes, 122 comments
  13. Show HN: I built a tool that watches webpages and exposes changes as RSS 48 upvotes, 17 comments
  14. Zig – Type Resolution Redesign and Language Changes 376 upvotes, 210 comments
  15. Show HN: Satellite imagery object detection using text prompts 18 upvotes, 5 comments
  16. Show HN: Vanilla JavaScript refinery simulator built to explain job to my kids 57 upvotes, 26 comments
  17. Faster asin() was hiding in plain sight 152 upvotes, 89 comments
  18. 5,200 holes carved into a Peruvian mountain left by an ancient economy 42 upvotes, 19 comments
  19. Entities enabling scientific fraud at scale (2025) 216 upvotes, 139 comments
  20. Show HN: Klaus – OpenClaw on a VM, batteries included 74 upvotes, 44 comments
  21. Launch HN: Sentrial (YC W26) – Catch AI agent failures before your users do 17 upvotes, 6 comments
  22. Wiz joins Google 130 upvotes, 88 comments
  23. CRusTTY: A pedagogical C interpreter with time-travel debugging capabilities 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  24. The Evolution of Lego Sorting (2001) 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. Lego's 0.002mm specification and its implications for manufacturing (2025) 304 upvotes, 250 comments
  26. Launch HN: Prism (YC X25) – Workspace and API to generate and edit videos 23 upvotes, 13 comments
  27. Personal Computer by Perplexity 4 upvotes, 1 comments
  28. I Was Interviewed by an AI Bot for a Job 12 upvotes, 9 comments
  29. The MacBook Neo 185 upvotes, 364 comments
  30. Swiss e-voting pilot can't count 2,048 ballots after decryption failure 88 upvotes, 196 comments

Last generated 4:00am, 12 March 2026. Source here.
